description.value:
Frequency once per hour

Trigger You're targeted with the spell @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Force Barrage]

Effect You deflect the magical shards of force when they're fired at you. Attempt a @Check[reflex] save against the caster's spell DC. If you succeed, you take no damage. If you're targeted by multiple shards of force, you can deflect only the first one.
